title: Day 16 end — sprint-3 Day 02 sett-3-stabilize-v3
content:
Day 16 (sprint-3 Day 02 local) end-of-day rollup.

Deliverables (atomic commit 6861c1f):
1. scripts/benchmark.cjs git_hygiene regex fix (split record-separator \x1e + broadened hygiene signals)
2. supabase/functions/dashboard-data/index.ts Edge Function scaffold (Brain/Hands decoupling, schema 0.1.0-scaffold)
3. .github/workflows/test.yml CI dedupe (removed duplicate deploy job using outdated amondnet vercel-action; trufflehog continue-on-error for main self-diff)
4. automa/team-state/blockers.md — 2 blockers CLOSED: BLOCKER-011 NPM approved (ai@6.0.168 + zod@4.3.6 via ADR-004), BLOCKER-012 CI/CD deploy+security fix
5. automa/state/claude-progress.txt — state drift reconcile (PR #17 MERGED, ADR-004 ACCEPTED post Day 15)
6. docs/audit/day-16-audit.md — matrix 20 metrics + 8 gaps + 4 grading (7.4/10)
7. docs/handoff/2026-04-22-session-end-day-16.md — handoff for next session

CoV 3x evidence:
- Run 1: 12165 PASS + 1 FAIL (flaky) = 12166 total (360s)
- Run 2: 12166 PASS + 0 FAIL = 12166 total (371s)
- Run 3: 12166 PASS + 0 FAIL = 12166 total (144s warm cache)
Baseline 12166 preserved. 1 flaky test identified (manifest.json deploy-smoke env-dependent, carry from main).

Benchmark: 4.17 → 4.14 (−0.03 honest post regex de-inflation).

Commit SHA: 6861c1f61eb749a963b32b63b48e0db04317de38 (pushed feature/sett-3-stabilize-v3 2026-04-22T05:42Z).

Blockers open: BLOCKER-007 render-warmup P3 (verified 5/5 scheduled runs SUCCESS today — can CLOSE Day 17), ADR-003 anon-key P3 CLI verify.

Risks: Option B premise (BLOCKER-011 resolved post-contract-lock) — tool-call pivot decision Day 03+ Andrea. Trufflehog masked until conditional base SHA wired. MCP calls direct = 0/15 (gap). Stress test not run. 2/3 blockers closed (budget miss).

Self score 7.4/10 (design 7.5 / originality 6.5 / craft 8.0 / functionality 7.5).

Read docs/handoff/2026-04-22-session-end-day-16.md for full report.
